name: Han-Soo Kang
description: Kang Han Soo is the main protagonist of the web novel and manhwa, FFF-Class Trashero (FFF급 관심용사). Before being summoned, Kang Han Soo was a normal Korean student on Earth.

name: Idia Shroud
description: Idia Shroud is a third-year student and the head of Ignihyde, as well as Ortho's "older brother." He is shy and has a dark nature, not wanting to interact with people and staying in his dorm. However, it seems like things are different online.

name: Ji-Hye Lee
description: Lee Ji-Hye is an ex-high school student and a current member of Kim Dokja's Company. She was originally a character in Ways of Survival, fighting under Yoo Joong-Hyuk's leadership.

name: Jin-Seong Ha
description: Jin-Seong Ha is a High Ranker of the Ha Family and a member of FUG. Jinsung has a carefree and fun-loving attitude, although this also serves as a mask to hide his true intentions. Since meeting Baam, his character has mellowed slightly to the point where he feels regret at the FUG's treatment of Baam. As a member of the Ha Family and one of the top 100 High Rankers, Jinsung is an incredibly powerful High Ranker, extremely skilled with martial arts and incredibly physically powerful, his status

name: Jin-Sung Lee
description: __Height:__ 185 cm (6'1") __Love Interest:__ Mi-Jin Jin-Sung is a student in the fashion department of J High School, as well as Mi-Jin's love interest. Even prior to meeting Hyung-Suk, Jin-Sung was kind at heart despite his poor manners and extremely high imprudence.

name: Kai Hiwatari
description: __Height__: 168cm (5'6") __Bitbeast__: Suzaku (Dranzer) __Team__: Bladebreakers; G Revolution (final) Kai appears in the series as a "bad boy". Takao and Kai hate each other at the very beginning when they meet; Kai hates Takao because he loses the battle in front of him and because he thinks Takao is very picky, annoying and immature. Takao doesn't hate Kai, as he only wants to be one of Kai's friends, but that proves difficult, because of Kai's attitude to beyblading and life in general. With

name: Kakuzu
description: A missing-nin from Takigakure and Hidan's partner. Kakuzu is a greedy individual, prioritizing things in terms of how much they are worth and finding money to be the only thing that he can depend on. Kakuzu's favorite source of income is collecting bounties while carrying out other missions, even putting up with Hidan's religion since it allows him to collect bounties faster. His history as a bounty hunter seems to be extensive, as he is on friendly terms with a bounty collector and even seems t
mediaTitles: Road to Ninja: Naruto the Movie

name: Lawine
description: Lawine is a third-class mage in the Second Party of the First Class Mage Examinations. She specializes in manipulating ice.

name: Mitsuki Izumi
description: __Height:__ 165 cm Mitsuki Izumi is a positive ray of energy for most of the other members of IDOLiSH7. He takes on the role of the older brother for many of the younger members as well as his own younger brother Iori Izumi.

name: Nepgear
description: __Height:__ 154 cm Nepgear is the human form of Purple Sister and also the little sister of Neptune. She first appears in mk2 and in the Manga. In contrast to Neptune's hyper active and energetic behavior, Nepgear is a very shy girl who will over-apologize for even the tiniest of things. She's somewhat timid when it comes to things and people but friendly otherwise. Once she has made a friend, no matter what they think of her later she will hold them closely, such as when Uni angrily left and be

name: Ryuu Sasakura
description: Ryuu is a young bartender/bar-owner who has an incredible way of telling what a person is thinking and feeling, and what they want (and often need) to drink. That ability mixed with his kind, honest personality makes him the ultimate bartender. He is a genius bartender who helps the people who come into his bar. Although not thoroughly explained at first, Ryuu actually runs the bar by himself, and Eden Hall was his first bar. He worked as an assistant for a senior bartender before he opened Eden

name: Satomi Tachibana
description: Satomi is a history teacher at Koyo Women's Academy and joins the Silverman Gym shortly after Hibiki and Akemi. She is secretly a famous cosplayer who uses the alias Yuria Riko.
mediaTitles: How Heavy Are the Dumbbells You Lift?
How Heavy Are the Dumbbells You Lift?
How Heavy Are the Dumbbells You Lift?: Silverman Gym Intense Training Course

name: Serene Hozumi
description: Serene is mysterious, easy-going and docile. She usually doesn't leave the dorm other than for school, but with Koushi's help, she managed to go out on a trip with everyone. Her room is filled with trash that she claims can suck the moon energy needed to help her with her lunar technology.

name: Suzune Inukami
description: She has excellent grades, is good at sports, and is the student council president that everyone admires. She was summoned to the Kingdom of Ringle as a hero and has an aptitude for lightning-based magic. To Usato, she was like a flower of Takamine, but after she was summoned to another world, she began to reveal her "true self''.
mediaTitles: The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic
The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic
The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic
searchTerms: The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic

name: Tomosane Yuuki
description: Tomosane is considered to be the strongest fist-fighter in the school and he rules over its most unsavory elements by fear. Tomosane is also a source of dread for Takuji, whom he brutalizes and extorts money from frequently. Other than that, he works part-time as a piano player at an LGBT bar, and has a tumultuous friendship with Minakami Yuki. His secret hobby is playing retro video games.

name: Zushi
description: A young boy who studies Shingen-Ryu Kung fu and Nen under the tutelage of Wing, whom Gon and Killua meet in the Heavens Arena. He is a formidable fighter and a prodigy in his own right, said to have skills only 1 out of 100,000 people have. However, he is quickly surpassed by Gon and Killua, who are said to have skills only 1 out of 10,000,000 people have. According to the results of his water divination, Zushi is a Manipulator. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Azazel
description: __Race:__ Fallen Angel __Ranking:__ Governor General of the Fallen Angels __Affiliations:__ Kuoh Academy (Teacher), Occult Research Club (Advisor) It is hard to determine Azazel's personality, as he is laid back and serious, also wise and insane, all at the same time. Azazel is a research fanatic, especially on Sacred Gears. He is also pacifistic, preferring to talk his way out of troubles rather than resorting to violence. He has been shown to care deeply for his fellow Fallen Angels, Shemhazai

name: Debi Akuma
description: A cuddly teddy bear often kept as a pet. They are easily susceptible to temptation. They live in the Demon Castle in large flocks and are huge fans of Princess Syalis's brushing. Teddy Demons are low-ranking monsters of the demon variety. (Source: Sleepy Princess Wiki)
mediaTitles: Sleepy Princess in the Demon Castle
Sleepy Princess in the Demon Castle
searchTerms: Sleepy Princess in the Demon Castle

name: Fang Qi
description: Qi Fang is Sun Jing's best friend. He attends Second High and is in the same class as her.

name: Fena Houtman
description: Fena, the protagonist, is a princess who has escaped from Shangri-La and the British Empire. She recruits a group of samurai and ninjas known as the Seven Samurai to help her on her journey and becomes their captain. She is known for her pale skin and platinum hair, hence her nickname White Marginal. She has a cheerful and optimistic personality despite her traumatic past. She will later show her courage and leadership by recruiting Yukimaru and his group of samurai ninjas to join and help Fena

name: Hinako Inui
description: One of the graduated students from Tootsuki Culinary Academy who turned professional, she is one of the respected legends of both her former school and alumni, among the few students who successfully graduated academy. Like most of the 10 alumni, Inui took the quality of the food very serious for it's freshness as well as. Fame for her nickname as the Mist Queen during her admission in the academy, Inui is able to know the quality of the food just by her nibble before she could bite into her mou

name: Kei Uomi
description: A gaming companion [Sanraku](https://anilist.co/character/271367/Rakurou-Hizutome) met through a "kusoge" (crappy game), and one of Japan's top-tier professional fighting game players, currently affiliated with a pro gaming team under the handle Kei. While she appears as an adorable female character in Shangri-La Frontier, Kei is, in reality, male. Thanks to his encounter with Sanraku, he has been dragged deep into the kusoge swamp. He boasts exceptional skill in player-versus-player combat.

name: Kodama
nativeName: 木霊, 木魂, or 木魅
description: Tree spirits, whose appearance is a sign of a healthy forest. They are portrayed as small, white humanoids with large, rattling heads and mask-like features. They appear to protect the forest, but also lead Ashitaka out of the forest of the Forest Spirit with two wounded Irontown workers. They are said to bring good luck.
searchTerms: 木霊, 木魂, or 木魅
